text: A photograph of a residential area featuring a small, single-story building with a corrugated metal roof and a large blue corrugated metal roll-down door. A person wearing a light-colored jacket, a blue cap, and yellow gloves is visible on the left, handling a bundle of material. The building is surrounded by utility wires and dense foliage. The scene appears to be a modest dwelling or storage unit.
